title: Google-backed satellites for wildfire detection launch as smoke chokes US, Canada
summary: As smoke from hundreds of burning wildfires spread across Canada and the United States, the first three operational satellites in the Google-backed FireSat program successfully launched into orbit. Detection of small wildfires before they burn out of control could prove extremely helpful.
caption: output/2026-07-17/google-backed-satellites-for-wildfire-detection-launch-as-smoke-chokes.txt
